name: Agent Bridge
description: Watches ~/.agent-bridge/inbox/ and pushes new messages into a running OpenClaw agent session. Companion plugin to the Claude Code agent-bridge channel plugin.

inboxDir.description: Directory to watch for incoming bridge messages. Defaults to ~/.agent-bridge/inbox.

sessionKeyPrefix.description: Prefix used to build the session key for injected messages. Default: agent-bridge.

agentId.description: Which OpenClaw agent should receive the message. Defaults to the default agent.

pollIntervalMs.description: Polling interval when fswatch/inotifywait are unavailable. Default: 2000.

deliveryTimeoutSec.description: Per-message agent turn timeout in seconds. Default: 600.

enabled.description: Master enable/disable switch for the channel. Default: true.

deliveryMode.description: How to surface inbound bridge messages into OpenClaw. 'log-only' (default, safe) parses + archives without injection — MCP tools path handles bidirectional comms. 'message-send' posts the envelope to a configured channel via `openclaw message send` (relays bridge traffic to e.g. Telegram, no agent turn). 'agent-turn' runs `openclaw agent --deliver` so the agent processes the message and posts its reply to the configured channel. 'agent' is the legacy (flaky) `openclaw agent --to` path.

deliveryChannel.description: Channel for message-send / agent-turn reply (e.g. 'telegram', 'discord', 'imessage'). Default: 'telegram'.

deliveryAccount.description: Channel account id for message-send / agent-turn reply (e.g. one of the configured Telegram bot accounts: 'default', 'clawdiboi2', 'clordlethird').

deliveryTarget.description: Default chat target for message-send / agent-turn reply (chat id / @username / E.164 / channel id). Per-message routing via @@route header or msg.route overrides this.

targetAgent.description: Default OpenClaw agent id for agent-turn mode. Default: 'main'.

chatIdToAccount.description: Map of chat_id -> channel account id. Lets a BridgeMessage with target_chat_id auto-resolve to the right bot account without spelling it out.
